title: Lepidaploa balansae
taxonomy: Lepidaploa balansae is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. It is further placed in the subfamily Vernonioideae. The genus Lepidaploa is part of the tribe Vernonieae. Lepidaploa balansae is a species of flowering plant that is native to South America. The classification of Lepidaploa balansae is not well-documented in my current knowledge, but based on Asteraceae classification, it would fall under one of the various subfamilies.
